debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

proof:
obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  let f := L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm f
  intro v
  have h1 := hF 0 v 0
  have h2 := hF 0 0 0
  simp only at h1 h2
  have hL0 : L (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← h2, hδL0]
  rw [toDual_symm_apply, h1, show (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, L.map_add, hL0, add_zero]
  rfl
successful_attempts:
obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  let f := L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm f
  intro v
  have h1 := hF 0 v 0
  have h2 := hF 0 0 0
  simp only at h1 h2
  have hL0 : L (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← h2, hδL0]
  rw [toDual_symm_apply, h1, show (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, L.map_add, hL0, add_zero]
  rfl
